description:
## Deep Component Audit ‚Äî hx-prose

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-prose/`
**wc-mcp Health Score:** 92 (A)
**Known issues:** _styles missing description.

### wc-mcp Tools ‚Äî USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** ‚Äî `--hx-` tokens. Typography (headings, body, links, code). Spacing. Colors. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** ‚Äî WCAG 2.1 AA. Heading hierarchy. Link styling. Reading width. Line height.
3. **Functionality** ‚Äî Style raw HTML content (CMS output). Heading styles. Lists. Tables. Code blocks. Blockquotes. Images. Links.
4. **TypeScript** ‚Äî Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** ‚Äî Shadow DOM. Light DOM content styling via ::slotted or adopted styles. CSS Parts. Max-width for readability.
6. **CEM Accuracy** ‚Äî Fix _styles description.
7. **Tests** ‚Äî 80%+ coverage. Various HTML content. Typography. Responsiveness.
8. **Storybook** ‚Äî Rich HTML content. Headings. Lists. Code. Tables.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** ‚Äî CRITICAL: text format output. Node body. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** ‚Äî CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-prose
